description_long: This shotgun features a compact, tactical design with a dark green and black color scheme, giving it a modern, urban appearance. The main body is robust, with a prominent cylindrical drum magazine at the center, suggesting a high-capacity, revolving action. The stock is angular and skeletal, likely made from a lightweight metal or polymer, and is attached to the rear with a distinctive bend for ergonomic support. The pistol grip is textured and contoured for secure handling, while the fore-end is streamlined and minimalistic. The barrel is relatively short, with no visible ribbing or venting, and the overall build emphasizes durability and ease of maneuverability in close-quarters environments. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, providing ample space for gloved fingers.
description: A compact, tactical shotgun with a green and black finish, featuring a drum magazine, skeletal stock, and ergonomic pistol grip. Its design is modern and built for urban, close-quarters use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, drum magazine, skeletal stock, and ergonomic pistol grip.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel opening, drum magazine profile, and narrow width of the shotgun.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the drum magazine and stock structure.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock's attachment, pistol grip, and the back of the drum magazine.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, short with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, moderately sized, with a smooth contour and no visible reinforcement
